    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    act(ArrayList, ArrayList, char[][], int, int, xLifeModel) - Method in class xZombie
    Performs this zombie's action for one simulation step.
    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class xLifeMain.MyActionListener
    Base on the text from button, give the action for proper button "Animate": start and stop timmer "Stick": stop timer, update move , redraw the grid and update score "Timer": every 50s run timer 1 times, update move, update score, grid and check ending "Close": exit the simulation "Save": open Dialog for asking name of the output file, then save current map to file "Load Map": Load new file, update all object - window - grid - status "Reset" : Load current map again and reset all variable

    C

    CENTER - Enum constant in enum class xEntity.Direction
     
    checkMoveValid(int, int) - Method in class xLifeModel
    Check if a move to a specific position is valid.

    E

    EAST - Enum constant in enum class xEntity.Direction
     

    F

    findFirstHumanNeighbour(int, int, int, int, ArrayList) - Method in class xZombie
    Finds the first human in the neighboring cells around the zombie.

    G

    geFile() - Method in class xLifeMain.MyActionListener
    Open FileDialog allow user can select map
    getBullets() - Method in class xSoldier
    Get the number of bullets left.
    getColor() - Method in class xEntity
    Gets the color used to represent this entity.
    getColor() - Method in class xHuman
    Get the color of the human.
    getColor() - Method in class xSoldier
    Get the color of the soldier.
    getCols() - Method in class xLifeModel
    Get the number of columns in the grid.
    getHumanPoint() - Method in class xLifeModel
    Get the current human score.
    getNewPosition(xEntity, int, int) - Method in class xLifeModel
    Get a new valid position for an entity based on its movement.
    getRemainMoves() - Method in class xLifeModel
    Get how many moves are left in the game.
    getRows() - Method in class xLifeModel
    Get the number of rows in the grid.
    getX() - Method in class xEntity
    Returns this entity's current x position.
    getY() - Method in class xEntity
    Returns this entity's current y position.
    getZombiePoint() - Method in class xLifeModel
    Get the current zombie score.

    I

    increaseHumanPoint() - Method in class xLifeModel
    Increase the human score by 1.
    increaseZombiePoint() - Method in class xLifeModel
    Increase the zombie score by 1.
    isProtect(Point) - Method in class xLifeModel
    Check if a position is inside a safe zone.

    main(String[]) - Static method in class xLifeMain
    the simulation start from this method

    Determines the movement direction of this entity.

    R

    reset(String) - Method in class xLifeModel
    Reset the game to its initial state and reload data from a file.

    S

    saveMapDialog() - Method in class xLifeMain.MyActionListener
    Open FileDialog allow user set up output file name Call toString method of xLifeModel to get current map save the string to file
    saveMapToFile(File) - Method in class xLifeMain.MyActionListener
    Write file process
    searchHuman(int, int, ArrayList) - Method in class xZombie
    Searches for a human at the given position in the human list.
    searchZombie(int, int) - Method in class xLifeModel
    Search for a zombie at a specific position.

    This method use for animation button, every 50s run 1 times,
    setX(int) - Method in class xEntity
    Sets the x position of this entity.
    setY(int) - Method in class xEntity
    Sets the y position of this entity.

    Update movement for all soldiers.

    Update actions for all zombies.

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class xEntity.Direction
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class xEntity.Direction

    X

    xEntity - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a generic entity in the simulation grid.
    xEntity() - Constructor for class xEntity
     
    xEntity.Direction - Enum Class in Unnamed Package
    Enum representing possible movement directions.
    xHuman - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class represents a Human in the game.
    xHuman(int, int) - Constructor for class xHuman
    Create a human at a specific position.
    xLifeMain - Class in Unnamed Package
    This model create the GUID for this simulator It also includes main Method
    xLifeMain() - Constructor for class xLifeMain
     
    xLifeMain.MyActionListener - Class in Unnamed Package
    This is Nested classes MyActionListener For listening the action from the GUI
    xLifeModel - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class represents the game model.
    xLifeModel(String, int) - Constructor for class xLifeModel
    Create the game model and load the map from a file.
    xSoldier - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class represents a Soldier in the game.
    xSoldier(int, int) - Constructor for class xSoldier
    Create a soldier at a specific position.
    xZombie - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a zombie in the simulation.
    xZombie(int, int) - Constructor for class xZombie
    Constructs a zombie at the given position.
